turns.user_message: I noticed I always apologize for my ideas before I even share them. It's like I assume they're not good enough.
I find myself shrinking away from any kind of spotlight because I'm convinced I'll disappoint people. I just feel like a constant letdown.
I honestly believe I don't deserve to take up space or have an opinion anymore. It feels like my very presence is a burden to others.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves.
